title: Chiropractors
description: Assess, treat, and care for patients by manipulation of spine and musculoskeletal system. May provide spinal adjustment or address sacral or pelvic misalignment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the functioning of the neuromuscularskeletal system and the spine using systems of chiropractic diagnosis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Diagnose health problems by reviewing patients' health and medical histories, questioning, observing, and examining patients and interpreting x-rays.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform a series of manual adjustments to the spine or other articulations of the body to correct the musculoskeletal system.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain and record patients' medical histories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain accurate case histories of patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise patients about recommended courses of treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze x-rays to locate the sources of patients' difficulties and to rule out fractures or diseases as sources of problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel patients about nutrition, exercise, sleeping habits, stress management, or other matters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with or refer patients to appropriate health practitioners when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend and arrange for diagnostic procedures, such as blood chemistry tests, saliva tests, x-rays, or other imaging procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Suggest and apply the use of supports such as straps, tapes, bandages, or braces if necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
